meaning: adj.[希神]风神 Aeolus 的,伊奥利亚人的,风的,风蚀的
examples: All these characters suggest aeolian dunes.
There was never yet such a storm but it was AEolian music to a healthy and innocent ear.
The results indicate that using cement stabilized aeolian sand and macadam as base course for road is feasible.
That catalog also contains neon signs, gas pumps and a 1927 Aeolian residential pipe organ so large it formerly occupied two rooms in a mansion in Walnut Lake, Mich.
